creator: petef@databits.net
text:
http://bento.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/errorlogs/e.4.2001041517/p5-MyObject-1.1,1.log

How-To-Repeat: 
Although the distfile has no version information in it's file name, it
appears MyObject.pm has been updated to version 1.2.  (judging by a diff
of the current distfile and the one found on ftp.freebsd.org.  diff is
available at http://hex.databits.net/~petef/freebsd/diff.p5-MyObject).
